title: Marketplace Manager - Treebo Hotels Global Group - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Treebo Hotels Global Group - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the Treebo Hotels Global Group family as a Marketplace Manager in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Treebo Hotels Global Group:
Treebo Hotels Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
